testcase.name: should skip creation when tables already exist
should create tables when they do not exist
should return products list with count
should handle search parameter
should handle family and marca filters
should return stock data for a product
should handle product with no stock rows
should reject order without clientCode
should reject order without lines
should create order with valid data
should return orders list for a vendor
should filter orders by status
should reject invalid saleType-less orderId
should confirm order and return detail with stockWarnings
should reject invalid orderId
should cancel order and return detail
should return list of family codes
should return list of brand strings
should return history and similar arrays
should require clientCode
parseIntSafe should handle valid and invalid inputs
saleType validation should only accept CC, VC, NV
